title: Metamorphoses I: In the Beginning
description: Ovid's creation of the world from Chaos: the poem that transmitted Greek mythology to the entire Western tradition.
introduction: Ovid's creation of the world from Chaos: the poem that transmitted Greek mythology to the entire Western tradition.

translation.text: Before the sea and lands and the sky that covers all, the face of nature was the same throughout the whole world — what they called Chaos.
